envDescription.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: Supabase service role key (server-only, bypasses RLS)
envDescription.GA4_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID for GA4 integration
envDescription.GA4_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET: Google OAuth 2.0 client secret for GA4 integration
envDescription.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Claude API key for test plan generation
envDescription.RESEND_API_KEY: Optional: Resend API key for email notifications
envDescription.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: Optional: Slack webhook URL for notifications
